title: SEC0: no correctness issues found
description:
Reviewed nie-hov Wave 0-1 implementations:

1. wallet/src/db.rs:
   - get_session_by_address(): SQL WHERE clauses correctly filter by address, role='payee', and state IN ('address_provided','sent'). All fields mapped, UUID parsing guarded, i64/u64 conversion checked.
   - sessions_to_watch(): Returns all payee sessions in ('address_provided','sent') with address IS NOT NULL. Row mapping complete, error handling comprehensive.

2. cli/src/commands.rs:
   - ConfirmationEvent struct and mpsc channel properly defined (capacity 32, line 350)
   - select! branch at line 1491 correctly handles conf_rx.recv() returning None
   - AddressWatchRegistry (DashMap-backed, Sync+Send) properly wrapped in Arc
   - Startup restoration (lines 352-369): sessions_to_watch() called, then registered in watch_registry before event loop starts—no race conditions possible

3. Test coverage:
   - test_get_session_by_address_hit/miss/wrong_state/wrong_role: all cases covered
   - test_sessions_to_watch_returns_unconfirmed_payee: validates both states
   - sessions_to_watch_returns_eligible_only: comprehensive filtering test
   - All tests pass with correct oracles (independent of code under test)

No correctness bugs identified. SQL semantics, error handling, thread safety, and test coverage all sound.
